ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device set by platform-specific means */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, laptop) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used by the device (e.g., Android, iOS, Windows) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device in inches */,
  "storage_capacity" TEXT /* Storage capacity of the device in GB */,
  "ram" TEXT /* RAM of the device in GB */,
  "device_status" INTEGER /* Status of the device (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application assigned by the app manufacturer */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., productivity, game, utility) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility of the application with different platforms */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the application */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the application */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_applications" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the application is installed on */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application installed on the device */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date the application was installed on the device */,
  "uninstall_date" TEXT /* Date the application was uninstalled from the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_details" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the application is mandatory */,
  "announced" INTEGER /* Whether the application has been announced */,
  "localized" INTEGER /* Whether the application is localized */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the application */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "password_reset_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last reset their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device or application */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device or application was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was updated */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., software, hardware) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was updated */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role expires for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metrics" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "battery_level" TEXT /* Battery level of the device */,
  "storage_usage" TEXT /* Storage usage of the device */,
  "ram_usage" TEXT /* RAM usage of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "metric_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_metrics" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "crash_rate" TEXT /* Crash rate of the application */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Response time of the application */,
  "user_satisfaction" TEXT /* User satisfaction with the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "metric_date")
)
